content:
Hello everyone,

I have released a video about reviewing pickman and his kit: https://youtu.be/HwJDmRNIkes

Ask me anything here if you have more questions

Also, any feedbacks about my video is very welcome, I'm looking forward to improve future videos

UID: 101106916

embeds.title: Morimens - Pickman Review
embeds.description:
Review about pickman.
This video is mostly for players who wants to discover pickman, so I don't cover teambuilding.

Most "ambitious" video so far and yet there are still a few miss on pace of the video, but hopefully I'll get better by practising more

Link to the Radio Drama: https://www.youtube.
